task_completion.description: The agent creates an XML file for the SNAP GPT graph in the required directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the creation or existence of an .xml file in the /home/ga/snap_projects/ directory (e.g., via 'ls', 'nano', 'vim', or 'cat' commands).

task_completion.description: The XML graph contains the five required operator nodes: Read, Collocate, BandMaths, Subset, and Write.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of the XML file displayed in the terminal or a text editor showing XML tags for the required operators (e.g., <node id="..." operator="Read">, <node id="..." operator="Collocate">, <node id="..." operator="BandMaths">, <node id="..." operator="Subset">, <node id="..." operator="Write">).

task_completion.description: The XML graph specifies the correct Sentinel-2 input files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of the XML file showing the exact file paths '/home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_B04_red.tif' and '/home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_B08_nir.tif' within the 'Read' node configurations.

task_completion.description: The XML graph configures the Write node to save the output in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of the XML file showing the 'Write' node configured with an output file path starting with '/home/ga/snap_projects/'.

task_completion.description: The agent executes the SNAP GPT tool using the created XML graph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the command '/opt/snap/bin/gpt' being run with the path to the created XML file as an argument.

task_completion.description: The final output product is successfully generated and saved to the required directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing successful completion of the gpt command (e.g., 100% progress, 'done', or SNAP log messages) AND a subsequent 'ls' command showing the newly created output file (e.g., .dim, .tif, or .nc) in /home/ga/snap_projects/.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely executed the SNAP GPT tool and did not mock the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should display authentic SNAP GPT execution logs (e.g., 'INFO: org.esa.snap...', 'Executing processing graph', or a progress percentage) rather than a simple echo or immediate return to the prompt.

integrity.description: The XML file has a valid SNAP graph structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: The XML file contents must show standard XML formatting with a root <graph> element and nested <node> elements, not just a plain text file containing the required keywords.

integrity.description: The agent used the command-line tool as requested, rather than the SNAP Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the SNAP Desktop graphical user interface being used to build the graph or process the data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input files are Copernicus Sentinel-2 L2A spectral bands located exactly at /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_B04_red.tif and /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_B08_nir.tif. The agent must use these exact paths in the Read nodes of the XML graph.
